name: cosmolabe-monorepo
description: Merged monorepo: Cosmolabe (product, visualization) and Bessel (compute engines, SDK, bessel CLI). See CLAUDE.md.

scripts.install:all: pnpm -C bessel install --frozen-lockfile && npm --prefix cosmolabe ci
scripts.verify:cosmolabe: npm --prefix cosmolabe run build && npm --prefix cosmolabe run test -- --exclude '**/catalog-all-cosmographia.test.ts' --exclude '**/xyzv-parser.test.ts'
scripts.verify: pnpm run fetch-kernels && pnpm run verify:bessel && pnpm run verify:cosmolabe
